Developer resources

Design tokens, ready to use.

Use these core values to bring Leicester Space Week consistency to digital products, templates and partner integrations.

CSS custom properties

The shared foundation.

:root {
  --lsw-orbit-navy: #0B1026;
  --lsw-beacon-amber: #E2672A;
  --lsw-civic-violet: #5B2A86;
  --lsw-steel-silver: #C9CED6;
  --lsw-paper-white: #F4F2ED;
  --lsw-ink: #14172B;

  --lsw-font-display: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  --lsw-font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
}
